description: The party that supplies a case's images/instructions -- a ROLE, not always a distinct org. Drives recognition of non-email-domain intake (WhatsApp / individuals) and address defaulting. A Case carries imageSourceId. WhatsApp intake is manual (ADR-0007).

lifecycle.note: Defined and staged; 1b import writes; Case reads. Not in the M1 four.

primaryColumn.description: Display name of the source party.

columns.description: email | whatsapp. Audatex out of scope.
-> Repairer when the source IS a Repairer (don't duplicate it). Nullable.
Optional default Inspection Address hint for address defaulting. Nullable.

notes: WorkProvider association is many-to-many (one source can serve several providers): cr1bd_imagesource_workprovider in relationships.json.
WhatsApp intake is manual; the planned timesaver bulk-imports exported WhatsApp media and OCR-matches images to Cases by VRM.
